extraction.one_line_summary: CIMOLAI Davide won stage 2 sprint from reduced 13-rider group after crosswinds split peloton in final 30km, beating ACKERMAN who led out from yellow jersey position.
tactical_patterns: Race leader SCHACHMANN personally drove splits at front to increase teammate ACKERMAN's advantage, unusual GC jersey work before sprint finish.
QUICKSTEP Bennett caught wrong side of crosswind split, revealing vulnerability even for top sprint teams without positional dominance pre-30km.
PATTERSON world champion performed extended domestique work keeping GC leader HIGUITA positioned, suggesting FDJ prioritizing stage control over rainbow jersey freedom.
Peloton reduced from full field to 13 riders in final 10km through sustained crosswind echeloning, not single acceleration point.

rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Max: positive: actively drove pace in yellow jersey to create splits favoring teammate, tactical maturity beyond typical GC protection.
rider_signals.ACKERMAN Pascal: negative: had perfect leadout position but lacked finishing speed from 150m out when CIMOLAI came around cleanly.
rider_signals.CIMOLAI Davide: positive: NTT already exceeded entire 2019 win total, suggesting significant rider or team development step-change in 2020.
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: caught wrong side of split despite being Quickstep's protected sprinter, positioning failure in predictable crosswind stage.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: crashed and required brother's bike at worst possible moment during front group's acceleration in crosswinds.
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: missed final 13-rider split despite GC ambitions, FDJ had to chase limiting losses rather than contesting stage.
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: moved to 4th overall at 23 seconds despite being Colombian champion in crosswind chaos, unexpected classics aptitude.
rider_signals.PATTERSON Mads: neutral: world champion doing extended domestique work suggests team tactics override rainbow jersey status in early-season stage races.
